subject: FW: next week?
body:
From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, December 12, 2007 2:23 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: next week?

 

Dear Lesley,

Just got your message and am in a rather noisy cafe studying, so I
thought it easier to email you. I'm afraid I will be going down to CT
tomorrow to celebrate my father's 60th birthday. I'll be leaving
directly after class, so, I'm afraid I won't be able to see Jeffrey
tomorrow. 

Next week I have nothing scheduled for Tuesday other than studying for
my final exams that Thurs and Fri. I'm afraid Wednesday will not work,
but I could stop by any time next Tues, 12/18. After that, there will be
no other opportunities, as I will be heading to CT and Boston for the
holidays and will not be back in NY until January 4th. If that won't
work, please convey my many regrets to Jeffrey. 

Sorry for all the hassle! 
Happy holidays,
Laura
body_html:
From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com]
Sent: Wednesday, December 12, 2007 2:23 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: next week?

 

Dear Lesley,

Just got your message and am in a rather noisy cafe studying, so I thought it easier to email you. I'm afraid I will be going down to CT tomorrow to celebrate my father's 60th birthday. I'll be leaving directly after class, so, I'm afraid I won't be able to see Jeffrey tomorrow.

Next week I have nothing scheduled for Tuesday other than studying for my final exams that Thurs and Fri. I'm afraid Wednesday will not work, but I could stop by any time next Tues, 12/18. After that, there will be no other opportunities, as I will be heading to CT and Boston for the holidays and will not be back in NY until January 4th. If that won't work, please convey my many regrets to Jeffrey.

Sorry for all the hassle!
Happy holidays,
Laura
